title: premna clavata
intro: Premna clavata, also known as the Himalayan or Indian purple-fleabane, is a flowering plant belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Premna clavata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Premna clavata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
